hero.title: Tikarsiwen tin ijjuch n addinat
hero.lead: Rejistir wen ehay alisteɣmar n haratan win addinat ijjanen s IATF

intro: Froje tan wi at-w-axdaman iknanen alisteɣmar daɣ edag wen alwaq wa id ijjan efes nasan

header.title: Ijjit n derhan n tudabat n ijjuch daɣ addabara n addinat

paragraphs: IATF itaj akayad n derhan n ijjuch addoben ad eqqil alxidmat tan alɣalim n open source

emptyState.title: War illenat har ajjudi addabara tan
paragraphs: IATF eɣna id tartit net ta tazzarat n alxidmat tan addinat
Addobat har ajjudi asissiki n addaror n data a fal ille derhan n ijjuch
